title: Recovered appeal: land at Sheen Way Playing Field, Sheen Way, Wallington, SM6 8NR (ref: 3250891 - 10 May 2021)
body: "Decision letter and Inspector’s Report for a recovered appeal for the erection of part one, part two storey building (4,943metres²) for special needs school (Use Class D1) for 246 students with a range of learning difficulties, together with ancillary multi-use games area (MUGA), landscaping and parking. "
